src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Remove inheritance from the deprecated Camel FatJarRouter class to align with modern Spring Boot application structure.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.human_impl: Changed `public class App extends FatJarRouter` to `public class App`.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Replace the legacy FatJarRouter.main(args) call with standard SpringApplicationBuilder initialization.
Explicitly import Google PubSub configuration to replace implicit setup previously handled by the base class or older context.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.human_impl: Added `@Import(GooglePubSubConfig.class)` annotation to the App class.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the removal of FatJarRouter and addition of SpringApplicationBuilder and configuration classes.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.human_impl: Removed `import org.apache.camel.spring.boot.FatJarRouter` and added imports for `SpringApplicationBuilder`, `Import`, and `GooglePubSubConfig`.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Remove outdated Javadoc comment that described the class as a Camel route builder setup, which is no longer accurate or necessary.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.human_impl: Deleted the `/** A spring-boot application that includes a Camel route builder... */` block.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Replace hardcoded error handling parameters with Spring @Value properties to allow configuration via environment variables.
Switch from deadLetterChannel to defaultErrorHandler with exponential backoff and logging to improve resilience and observability.
Implement a custom onRedelivery handler to log root cause details during retry attempts.
Add an interceptFrom processor to flatten Google Pub/Sub attributes into standard Camel headers for inbound messages.
Add an interceptSendToEndpoint processor to collect standard Camel headers into Google Pub/Sub attributes for outbound messages.
Remove the specific onException handler for ConnectException, relying instead on the global defaultErrorHandler configuration.
Remove @SuppressWarnings annotation to enforce stricter type checking required by Java 17.
Replace string literal charset name with StandardCharsets constant for type safety and clarity.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Changed "UTF-8" to StandardCharsets.UTF_8.name() in DEFAULT_NETEX_CHARSET_NAME definition.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Replace legacy File API with java.nio.file.Files and Path for modern file handling.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Used Files.list(Paths.get(...)) instead of File.listFiles() in CleanNetexOutputPathProcessor.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Replace array iteration with Stream API for filtering and mapping operations.
Utilize Java 17 string handling capabilities for complex string formatting in logs.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Used simpleF with multi-line format strings in log processors.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Use local variable type inference where applicable to reduce boilerplate.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Implicitly used var-like patterns in lambda parameters and stream operations.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Update Apache Camel API calls to be compatible with Camel 3.x and Java 17.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Changed simple() calls to simpleF() for formatted strings and updated header access patterns.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Remove usage of deprecated Java or Camel methods that are removed in newer versions.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Replaced deprecated file handling and stream processing methods with modern equivalents.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Update import statements to reflect new package structures in updated dependencies.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Added imports for java.nio.file, java.util.stream, and updated Camel imports.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Refactor exception handling to use more specific exceptions and try-with-resources.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.human_impl: Updated process methods to handle exceptions more gracefully without throwing checked exceptions where possible.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to support the new JDK version.
Add explicit JAXB API and runtime dependencies required because JAXB was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
Add the Glassfish JAXB runtime implementation to ensure XML binding works at runtime on Java 17.
Replace JUnit 4 dependencies with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) to align with modern testing standards supported by Java 17.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine to enforce pure JUnit 5 usage and remove legacy JUnit 4 compatibility.
Upgrade Apache Camel to version 3.18.2 which provides native support for Java 17.
Refactor Camel dependencies to use Spring Boot starters for easier configuration and dependency management.
Introduce Entur helper libraries for GCP storage, calendar handling, and logging to standardize infrastructure code.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry to expose application metrics for monitoring.
Add Logstash Logback encoder to format logs for structured logging pipelines.
Add Janino dependency to support dynamic expression evaluation in Logback configuration.
Add JAXB2 Basics runtime to support generated equals, hashCode, and toString methods in JAXB models.
Add Entur Google Pub/Sub helper library to simplify message publishing and subscribing.
Add JAXB adapters for Java 8+ time types to handle date/time serialization in XML.
Add ZeroTurnaround Zip library for handling ZIP file operations.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for utility methods.
Add Apache Commons IO for file and stream utilities.
Add Google Guava library for collections and utilities.
Add AssertJ library for fluent assertions in tests.
Add Apache Commons Collections4 for additional collection utilities.
Configure Maven JAXB2 plugin to generate Java classes from XSD schemas during build.
Update Surefire plugin configuration to pass JVM arguments for memory management.
Remove Fabric8 and Docker Maven plugins as they are no longer used for deployment.
Remove old Spring Boot dependency management and replace with modern starters.
Remove explicit Guice dependency as it is likely managed by other libraries or no longer needed.
Remove Saxon-HE dependency as it is no longer required.
Remove Arquillian testing dependencies as they are no longer used.
Update parent POM to org.entur.ror:superpom to inherit common build configurations.
Update project name, description, and SCM information to reflect current state.
Add EUPL-1.2 license information to the POM.
Add SCM connection details for GitHub.
Add NeTEx Java model dependency for transit data exchange.
Add SIRI Java model dependency for real-time transit data.
Add calendar helper library for date/time operations.
Add logging helper library for standardized logging.
Add Camel metrics starter for monitoring Camel routes.
Add Camel HTTP starter for HTTP component support.
Add Camel Quartz starter for scheduled tasks.
Add Camel JAXB starter for XML binding support.
Add Camel StAX starter for streaming XML processing.
Add Camel EhCache starter for caching support.
Add Camel ZipFile starter for ZIP file processing.
Add Camel Google Pub/Sub starter for message queue integration.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features.
Add Spring Boot Web starter for web application support.
Exclude Geronimo Servlet 3.0 spec to avoid conflicts with newer servlet APIs.
Add Spring Boot configuration processor for metadata generation.
Add Camel test Spring JUnit5 dependency for testing Camel routes.
Add JUnit Platform Launcher for test execution.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to gitignore to exclude macOS metadata files from version control.
Add /local_config/ to gitignore to exclude local configuration directories from version control.
Add /terraform/.terraform to gitignore to exclude Terraform state and lock files from version control.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite README to accurately describe the project's purpose (Avinor flight data to NeTEx conversion) and remove outdated generic boilerplate.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced generic 'extime' description with specific details about Avinor data sources, NeTEx output, and Nordic NeTEx Profile compliance.

README.md.general_idea: Document the specific input data sources and output formats used by the application.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Dataflows' section listing Avinor XML feed URLs and NeTEx zip delivery format.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the scope of data processing regarding airport and airline whitelists.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Scope' section explaining that only whitelisted airports/airlines are processed.

README.md.general_idea: Explain how reference data (StopPlaces/Quays) is handled and linked to the Norwegian Stop Place Register.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Reference data' section detailing the AVI:Quay:[Airport code] convention.

README.md.general_idea: Document application configuration parameters for airports, airlines, and general Spring Boot properties.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Configuration' section with tables for avinor.* properties and class references for whitelists.

README.md.general_idea: Document system integration details for production (Google Cloud) and development (local disk/emulator) environments.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'System integration' section describing GCS/PubSub usage and local overrides.

README.md.general_idea: Update build and run instructions to reflect new dump/offline/normal modes and remove obsolete Docker/Vagrant commands.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old docker run commands with detailed instructions for dump, offline, and normal modes using mvn spring-boot:run.

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for enabling Maven debugging for local development.
README.md.human_impl: Added snippet for configuring spring-boot-maven-plugin with -Xdebug arguments.

README.md.general_idea: Document the health check endpoint for readiness and liveness probes.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Readiness and liveness' section pointing to http://127.0.0.1:9001/health.
